description: Code review fixes: Kotahi harvest Sol tiebreak, Fujin i18n, participantForces in step-by-step no-Poets battles
steps: Fix Kotahi harvest pass to call applySolTiebreakBonus in the tiebreak section, matching the main harvest loop
Replace hardcoded 'Confirmar' string in Fujin overlay with i18n call, adding translation keys to both language files
Add participantForces: preResolutionForces to the step-by-step no-Poets else-branch in resolveNextBattle
acceptance_criteria: Kotahi harvest tiebreak calls applySolTiebreakBonus when Sol wins on honor
Fujin confirm button uses i18n translation key 'kami.resolution.fujinConfirm'
Both language files include the new translation key (Spanish: 'Confirmar', English: 'Confirm')
participantForces is assigned in step-by-step no-Poets branch of resolveNextBattle
findings: All 3 review issues fixed. Kotahi harvest tiebreak now calls applySolTiebreakBonus matching the main harvest loop. Fujin confirm button uses i18n with new key kami.resolution.fujinConfirm. participantForces added to step-by-step no-Poets branch. TypeScript compilation passes.
